summary: Azazel, a demon king, is in a predicament as his seal of assimilation grows stronger with YU's increasing power. Meanwhile, Elric and Marquis are in the midst of battle against the Red Lions, but things take a turn when it's revealed that Lord Marquis' eye has been taken by someone stronger than expected.
key_moments: YU obtains the Seal of Assimilation and grows stronger
Azazel struggles to control YU as he becomes more powerful
Lord Elric returns to the battlefield, and a new battle begins
